name: Quiche Aux Fruits De Mer
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound cooked fresh shrimp, crab & lobster combination
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onions in butter for 1 to 2 minutes.
2. Add fish and stir for 2 minutes.
3. Add pepper and white wine. Raise heat and boil for 1 minute.
4. Allow mixture to cool slightly.
5. Beat eggs, cream, salt, and pepper.
6. Gradually add the fish mixture.
7. Pour egg-fish mixture into pastry shell and sprinkle with cheese.
8. Bake at 375 degrees for 25 to 30 minutes.
Serves 4 to 6.
